Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/globalTimersInEffect_preview.ts(6,3): warning TS377073: Prefer using Effect.sleep or Schedule from Effect instead of setTimeout inside Effect generators. effect(globalTimersInEffect)


==== /.src/globalTimersInEffect_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics globalTimersInEffect:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.gen(function*() {
      setTimeout(() => {}, 100)
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377073: Prefer using Effect.sleep or Schedule from Effect instead of setTimeout inside Effect generators. effect(globalTimersInEffect)
    })
